Who We Are

Clothing that
tells your
story

At Nirvaaan, we believe clothing should be more than fashion — it should be an expression of who you are. Every piece is made with creativity, craftsmanship, and a whole lot of heart.

Sarita
Founder & Maker

Every garment is designed, stitched, and reworked by hand — from the first sketch to the final stitch.

Saniya
Client Experience

The friendly face you'll connect with — from your first idea to the moment your piece is ready.
